你没有领地: You do not have a territory
你没有权限删除此领地: You do not have permission to delete this territory
你没有权限重命名此领地: You do not have permission to rename this territory
你没有权限变更此领地: You do not have permission to modify this territory
你没有传送到此领地的权限: You do not have permission to teleport to this territory
§l§2━━━ 领地帮助 ━━━\n\n§l§a创建类:\n §r/tty a:
§l§2━━━ Territory Help ━━━

§l§aCreation:
  §r/tty add <pos1> <pos2>  Create territory
  §r/tty add_sub <pos1> <pos2>  Create sub-territory
  §r/tty quick add  Quick create territory
  §r/tty quick add_sub  Quick create sub-territory

§l§eManagement:
  §r/tty set <permission> <value> <name>  Set permission
  §r/tty member add/remove <player> <name>  Manage members
  §r/tty manager add/remove <player> <name>  Manage admins
  §r/tty settp <coords> <name>  Set teleport point
  §r/tty del <name>  Delete territory
  §r/tty rename <old> <new>  Rename territory
  §r/tty resize <name>  Resize territory

§l§bQueries:
  §r/tty list  List my territories
  §r/tty tp <name>  Teleport to territory
该玩家没有领地: This player does not have a territory
重载领地配置和数据完成: Reloaded territory configuration and data completed
你没有在此领地上破坏的权限: You do not have permission to break in this territory
你没有在此领地上放置的权限: You do not have permission to place in this territory
你没有在此领地上交互的权限: You do not have permission to interact in this territory
你没有在此领地上伤害的权限: You do not have permission to cause damage in this territory
无法重命名领地: 新名字: Cannot rename territory: the new name
未检测到Territory插件本体,插件拒绝加载: Territory plugin core not detected, plugin refuses to load
无法在控制台使用此命令: This command cannot be used in the console
三维领地为立方体,需要领地的两个对角坐标,并注意高度需要覆盖领地: A 3D territory is a cube, requiring two diagonal coordinates, ensuring height covers the territory
子领地需要在父领地之内创建,不能超出父领地,只有父领地的所有者和管理员有权限创建: Sub-territories must be created within the parent territory, cannot extend beyond, and can only be created by the parent territory owner or admin
§l选择你要传送的领地: Select the Territory to Teleport To
§l输入你要传送的领地: Enter the Territory to Teleport To
你未更改领地权限,领地权限不会变化: You did not change the territory permissions, they will remain the same
§l是否允许外人领地内交互: Allow Non-Members to Interact in Territory
§l是否允许外人领地内破坏: Allow Non-Members to Break Blocks in Territory
§l是否允许外人传送至领地: Allow Non-Members to Teleport to Territory
§l是否允许外人领地内放置: Allow Non-Members to Place Blocks in Territory
§l是否允许领地边缘活塞活动: Allow Territory Edge Pistons to Activate
§l选择要删除成员的领地: Select the Territory from Which to Remove Members
只要这里写了一个字都会以此为输入值: Any input here will be used as the value
§l选择要添加成员的领地: Select the Territory to Add Members To
§l选择要删除领地管理员的领地: Select the Territory from Which to Remove Admins
§l领地管理员有领地权限设置、成员管理、领地传送点设置、创建子领地的权限,请把握: Territory admins have permissions to manage settings, members, teleport points, and create sub-territories. Choose wisely
§l选择要添加领地管理员的领地: Select the Territory to Add an Admin To
§l选择要设置传送点的领地: Select the Territory to Set a Teleport Point For
§l接收领地的玩家名: Enter the Player Name to Receive the Territory
§l§1设置自己管理的领地的传送点: §1Set Teleport Point for Your Managed Territory
经济配置错误,检查价格是否大于0;领地价格依然保持默认: Wrong economic configuration, check if the price is greater than 0; The territory price remains the same
你的资产不足以设置此大小的领地,设置此领地所需要的资金为:: You don't have enough money to set up a territory of this size, and the money required to set up this territory are:
无法设置领地为一个点: It is not possible to set a territory to a point
你的领地大小超过所能创建的最大面积,无法创建: Your territory is larger than the maximum area you can create and can't be created
无法在世界之外设置领地: It is not possible to set a territory outside of the world
您的领地已被删除,以当前价格返还资金:: Your territory has been deleted and the money are returned at the current price:
进入快速创建领地模式，请使用木棍点地确定领地第一个点: Entered quick territory creation mode, please use a stick to tap the ground to set the first point of the territory
进入快速创建子领地模式，请使用木棍点地确定子领地第一个点: Entered quick sub-territory creation mode, please use a stick to tap the ground to set the first point of the sub-territory
坐标在不同维度，无法创建领地: Coordinates are in different dimensions, cannot create territory
已记录此坐标为第一个坐标，请选择第二个坐标: This coordinate has been recorded as the first point, please select the second coordinate
已记录此坐标为第二个坐标，请通过提示完成领地创建: This coordinate has been recorded as the second point, please follow the prompts to complete territory creation
领地数据不完整，无法创建领地: Territory data is incomplete, cannot create territory
§l§1更改自己的领地大小: §1Change the size of your own territory
领地新范围存在领地冲突,检查是否与其它领地重叠或者超过父领地及小于子领地范围: Territory range conflict detected. Check for overlaps with other territories, ensure it does not exceed parent territory boundaries, and contains all sub-territories.
§l§4请谨慎选择要删除的领地，此操作不可恢复！: §l§4Please select the territory to delete carefully. This action cannot be undone!
§l§4警告：删除领地不可恢复！\n§r您确定要执行此操作吗？:
§l§4Warning: Deleting a territory is permanent!
§rAre you sure you want to proceed?
§l选择你要管理的领地: §lSelect the territory you want to manage
§l选择你要添加成员的领地: §lSelect the territory you want to add members to
§l选择你要删除成员的领地: §lSelect the territory you want to delete members from
§l选择你要删除管理员的领地: §lSelect the territory you want to delete administrators from
§l选择你要添加管理员的领地: §lSelect the territory you want to add administrators to
